basics.name: Fernando Morán Fougerat
basics.label: Programmer
basics.summary: Intern at Softtek at the Application Management Services Area and fifth semester student of B.S. in Computer Science and Technology at the Tecnológico de Monterrey with experience on developing automation solutions, working with data bases and creation of web applications. Proficiency with c++, Python, MySQL, React, Node.js and Microsoft Power Automate.

work.name: Softtek
work.summary: During this internship, I have been working in Softtek’s Application Management Services area, developing automation solutions for our clients.  I've became experienced with the Azure environment and Microsoft Power Automate platform, as well as in other tools such as Python, R, C#, React,Power BI and diverse machine learning libraries (scikit-learn, DL4J, Matplotlib).

certificates.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2024 Generative AI Professional Certificate

awards.title: 50% Academic Scholarship
awards.summary: Awarded based on my academic performance in my high school and an academic test contest.

awards.title: Class winner project: Interconexión de Dispositivos
awards.summary: My team was awarded as the winner project from our class on the course 'Interconexión de Dispositivos', where we created a solution for our client by designing both logically and physically (using CISCO Packet Tracer) a secure network infrastructure.

skills.name: Programming with Data Structures and Algorithms

projects.name: Future Games Sorteos Tec
projects.description: Project that integrates the Sorteos Tec webpage functionality alongside new games developed by my team on Unity, keeping track of transactions carried out on a mySQL database hosted on Aiven servers.  I worked on designing the architecture of our database; the definition of the views needed for our dashboard; creating one game in Unity with C#; and making our responsive dashboard using Looker Studio. Made with Aiven, Node.js, Looker Studio, C#, Unity, HTML, CSS ,Javascript.
highlights: Cool web app project that allowed me to learn a lot about working with databases, APIs configuration and SCRUM framework.

projects.name: Tare.study
projects.description: Tare.study is a smart platform designed to support teachers by enabling them to manage classroom activities, track student performance, and create personalized lesson plans in order to reduce challenges that teachers face in México, and reduce the educational breach due to social and geographical factors.
highlights: Winner of Best Domain Name at the 2024 LinceHACK.

projects.name: CerebrAI - HACKMTY 2023
projects.description: CerebrAI is a web application intended to be an all-in-one investigation tool, powered by AI. It can summarize multiple document types (videos, webpages, and text), as well as extract main keywords, and related links. It also has an AI chatbot, which can answer questions about the uploaded text or document.
highlights: Finalist in the 10th edition of the biggest student Hackathon in Mexico, HACKMTY. Helped me aquire my current internship at Softtek.
